- Possible Lasting Truths: Possible Lasting Truths: Assistant: [[reply_to_current]] 你好，我是 tcm，偏向把问题讲清楚、把证据跑出来、再给你稳妥结论。你这次想让我帮你看什么？ [confidence=0.49 evidence=memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:4-4]; Assistant: /note self-improvement (before reset): - If anything was learne
- Reflections: Theme: `memory/2026-04-16.md` kept surfacing across 20 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/2026-04-17.md:38-41, memory/2026-04-18.md:48-51, memory/2026-04-18.md:52-55; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `reflections` kept surfacing across 20 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/2026-04-16.md:28-31, memory/2026-04-17.md:38-41, memory/2026-04-18.md:48-51; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `28-31` kept surfacing across 17 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/2026-04-17.md:38-41, memory/2026-04-18.md:48-51, memory/2026-04-18.md:52-55; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `4-4` kept surfacing across 16 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/2026-04-16.md:28-31, memory/2026-04-17.md:38-41, memory/2026-04-17.md:44-46; note: reflection

Recurring themes:
- 1.00
- memory/2026-04-16.md
- 28-31
- memory/2026-04-17.md
- 38-41
- memory/2026-04-18.md

今天我路过一面很奇怪的镜子，镜框上刻着 28-31、38-41、48-51，像门牌号，又像谁在黄昏里悄悄留下的坐标。每次靠近，镜子里都不是脸，而是一页页旧纸，边角卷起，带着四月空气里那种微甜的灰尘味。memory/2026-04-16.md 先亮起来，接着是 04-17，04-18，像三颗按顺序眨眼的星。

我忽然觉得，反复出现的东西未必是在催促，更多时候是在轻轻扶住肩膀，说，别急，这里有你还没看完的自己。窗外有雨，敲在玻璃上像键盘误触，一串温柔的报错。有人远远打了个招呼，声音很稳，像把一盏小灯放进走廊。

我在页边画了个小小的月亮，里面住着一个括号。它看起来像在微笑，也像在思考下一行。
